overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character moves from street level up through elevated walkways and down into dark back alleys, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a dense urban environment with heavy Japanese-inspired neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city sidewalk with commercial storefronts and hotels

events.description: muscular pedestrian in vest passes close to camera on the right
yellow taxi drives past on the street from right to left
camera approaches and begins ascending concrete stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past pedestrians and storefronts with bright neon signage

notable_agents.action: muscular man in leather vest walking past camera
yellow taxi driving along the street

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with ramen bowl graphic
vertical neon HOTEL sign on building facade
green street sign mounted on building wall
tall structure with multiple stacked digital advertisements
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vibrant cyberpunk city street at night, with neon signs illuminating the sidewalk. The camera moves forward past a muscular pedestrian and watches a yellow taxi drive by. The street is lined with commercial buildings including a hotel and ramen shop, with a green bike lane running alongside the pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with concrete stairs and metal railings

events.description: ascends stairs from street level to elevated plaza area
emerges into more open plaza area with brighter ambient neon light

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs with red metal railings to reach upper pedestrian level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to elevated walkway
rusted red handrail along the left side of stairs
large vertical sign with Japanese characters and HOテル
tall palm tree in concrete planter on upper level
open paved area at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase from the street level, passing red metal railings. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into a paved plaza with a palm tree and views of the neon-lit hotel sign with Japanese characters. The street level with its taxi and storefronts falls away behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with pharmacy, digital billboards and outdoor seating

events.description: enters open plaza area with Bailey's Pharmacy sign visible on right
begins descending stairs into darker alleyway with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated plaza past outdoor seating and vending areas toward the pharmacy

notable_agents.action: person standing near the Bailey's Pharmacy entrance

entered.detail: illuminated sign for Bailey's Pharmacy on building facade
large screen displaying animated advertisements
metal table and chairs set on the plaza pavement
bright green automated vending machine with orange trim
steep metal staircase with red railings leading downward

segments.scene_description: Walking through the elevated plaza, the camera passes outdoor seating and approaches Bailey's Pharmacy with its illuminated signage. Large digital billboards glow on the left while a bright green vending machine stands near the edge of the plaza. The camera heads toward a set of red metal stairs leading down into a darker area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley beneath elevated highway with corrugated metal walls

events.description: descends from plaza into enclosed alleyway with corrugated metal walls and vending machines
lighting becomes significantly darker under the massive overpass structure

agents.ego_description: moving down stairs into a narrow alley with trash bags and industrial air conditioning units

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass casting shadows over the alley
rusted corrugated metal siding on building exterior
large industrial HVAC unit mounted on building wall
concrete wall with spray paint graffiti and Asian characters
black garbage bags piled against the metal wall

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into a narrow service alley beneath the elevated highway. The environment becomes industrial with corrugated metal walls, air conditioning units, and trash bags. Lighting drops significantly under the massive concrete overpass structure, and graffiti covers the concrete walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark back alley with debris and people sitting against walls

events.description: encounters people sitting on the ground in the dark alley against the walls
begins ascending steep concrete stairs to exit the alley

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dark narrow alley with debris and people resting on the ground near trash

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground against the concrete wall
second person sitting in the shadows near debris

entered.detail: individuals seated on the pavement against the alley wall
chain link fence blocking off construction area
thick utility pole with wires running overhead
steep concrete staircase leading upward out of the alley
illuminated billboard visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the dark back alley, the camera passes people sitting on the ground against the walls. The space is cluttered with debris and trash bags, enclosed by metal fencing and overshadowed by the highway above. The camera approaches a steep set of concrete stairs leading upward toward light.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass approach to street intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: ascends stairs and emerges from underpass toward street level with crosswalk visible
approaches crosswalk with red traffic lights visible at the intersection

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs out of the dark alley and approaching a street intersection under the overpass

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench under the overpass near the stairs

entered.detail: bright yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the street ahead
traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
open street intersection visible beyond the underpass
concrete ceiling of the highway overpass overhead
modern glass building facade visible across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera climbs the steep stairs out of the dark alley, emerging under a massive concrete overpass. A street intersection lies ahead with a yellow crosswalk and red traffic lights visible. The transition from the enclosed dark alley to the more open underpass area brings increased ambient light from the street beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit city street up into an elevated urban plaza before descending toward a darker district. It begins at street level, gliding past a muscular pedestrian and a passing yellow taxi amidst the glow of ramen shops and hotel signs. As the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by red metal railings, the perspective shifts upward, leaving the bustling storefronts behind to reveal a paved plaza featuring a lone palm tree. The scene then expands across the elevated walkway, passing outdoor seating and a bright green vending machine under the glare of large digital billboards and the illuminated sign of Bailey's Pharmacy. Finally, the camera moves toward a set of red metal stairs, turning away from the bright plaza to head down into a shadowed area.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends into a gritty industrial alleyway before climbing back toward the illuminated city streets. It begins by dipping beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, where the environment shifts into a dim service alley characterized by corrugated metal walls, air conditioning units, and graffiti. As the camera moves deeper into the shadows, the space becomes more cluttered with debris and metal fencing, passing figures resting against the walls in the oppressive darkness. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and ascends a steep set of concrete stairs, leaving the enclosed alley behind. Finally, the camera emerges from the gloom into the expanded light of a street intersection, where a yellow crosswalk and red traffic lights signal a return to the open urban environment.
